ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., conference, workshop, meeting) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the event is held */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the event (e.g., planning, active, completed) */,
  "registration_open_date" TEXT /* Date when registration opens */,
  "registration_close_date" TEXT /* Date when registration closes */,
  "contact_person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact person for the event */,
  "budget" REAL /* Estimated budget for the event */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the event */,
  "estimated_attendees" INTEGER /* Estimated number of attendees */,
  "actual_attendees" INTEGER /* Actual number of attendees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_contact_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_person_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the venue */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the venue */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the venue */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the venue */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* JSON array of amenities available at the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilitators" (
  "facilitator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facilitator */,
  "facilitator_name" TEXT /* Name of the facilitator */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the facilitator */,
  "place_of_employment" TEXT /* Place of employment of the facilitator */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the facilitator */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the facilitator's photo */,
  "availability" TEXT /* JSON array of available dates and times */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the facilitator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facilitator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_facilitators" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "facilitator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facilitator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the facilitator in the event */,
  "session_title" TEXT /* Title of the session or presentation */,
  "session_description" TEXT /* Description of the session or presentation */,
  "session_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "session_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "session_room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room where the session is held */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "facilitator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_facilitators_session_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendees" (
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendee */,
  "attendee_name" TEXT /* Name of the attendee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the attendee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the attendee */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company or organization the attendee belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the attendee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the attendee */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the attendee */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the attendee */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the attendee */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the attendee */,
  "dietary_restrictions" TEXT /* JSON array of dietary restrictions */,
  "special_requests" TEXT /* JSON array of special requests */,
  "is_speaker" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the attendee is a speaker */,
  "is_volunteer" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the attendee is a volunteer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_attendees" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the attendee registered for the event */,
  "check_in_time" TEXT /* Time the attendee checked in */,
  "check_out_time" TEXT /* Time the attendee checked out */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number assigned to the attendee for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "attendee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the attendee registered for the event */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the registration */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "registration_type" TEXT /* Type of registration */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code used during registration */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accommodations" (
  "accommodation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accommodation */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Check-in date */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Check-out date */,
  "hotel_name" TEXT /* Name of the hotel */,
  "hotel_address" TEXT /* Address of the hotel */,
  "hotel_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the hotel */,
  "hotel_email" TEXT /* Email address of the hotel */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number assigned to the attendee */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* JSON array of amenities in the room */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accommodation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accommodations_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accommodations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the registration */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "refund_status" TEXT /* Status of any refunds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_registration_id FOREIGN KEY ("registration_id") REFERENCES registrations ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the schedule */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the schedule */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room */,
  "session_title" TEXT /* Title of the session */,
  "session_description" TEXT /* Description of the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session */,
  "facilitator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facilitator leading the session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_facilitator_id FOREIGN KEY ("facilitator_id") REFERENCES facilitators ("facilitator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "room_name" TEXT /* Name of the room */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the room */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* JSON array of amenities available in the room */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the room */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* JSON array of equipment available in the room */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the staff member belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the staff member */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the staff member */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the staff member */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the staff member */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the staff member */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* JSON array of social media links */,
  "availability" TEXT /* JSON array of available dates and times */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the staff member is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)
